questionHtml: State one reason why you would expect the value of ΔH calculated from the ∆Hf⦵ values, given in section 12 of data booklet, to differ from your answer to (d)(i).
markschemeHtml: bond energies are average values «not specific to the compound» ✔

meta.title: State one reason why you would expect the value of ΔH calculated from the ∆Hf⦵ values, given in section 12 of data booklet, to differ from your answer to (d)(i).
